_method: Grow composite star rating (TEST — Glenvale only). Each pillar scored 0-5 vs its target by linear interpolation between three anchors: floor=0 stars, target=3 stars, stretch=5 stars (clamped 0-5). Anchors — Sales YoY: floor -8%, target +8%, stretch +20%. Customer Google-health: floor 1.66, target 3.32, stretch 5.0. People RMS-health: floor 1.66, target 3.32, stretch 5.0. OPERATIONS = 50/50 blend of two normalized scores: (a) avg F1 race score (lower=better) anchors floor 320 / target 190 / stretch 130, and (b) brand-audit QTD /5 anchors floor 4.0 / target 4.5 / stretch 5.0. Composite = simple average of the four pillars. All on a quarter-to-date basis (Q2 2026: 1 Apr-14 Jun). Glenvale Operations: F1 270->1.15 stars, audit 4.67->3.68 stars, 50/50 -> 2.4 stars.
